# `sceneHeadModels`



This is the schema for Head Models, the properties of object `sceneHeadModels`.

## Head Models Attributes

| Attribute | Type | Default | Description | Required |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **name** | string |  | A head model name for the selection GUI. | Yes |
| **url** | string |  | The head model GLTF URL. You must scale and rotate your source GLTFs appropriately. | Yes |
